bleedModel.description: No bleed. Color prints edge-to-edge within trim. Cards have 1/8" rounded corners.

surfaces.label: Front
surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the FRONT of a card affix.

Vertical orientation: 2.125" wide × 3.375" tall.
Horizontal orientation: 3.375" wide × 2.125" tall.

No bleed — color can print edge-to-edge within the trim size. The card has 1/8" (0.125") rounded corners.
Safe zone: 0.125" inset from all edges — keep all text and critical content inside (vertical: 1.875" × 3.125", horizontal: 3.125" × 1.875").

No restricted zones — the front is fully customizable.

Design tips:
- These are small physical cards affixed to 8.5×11" letters.
- PDF format only. No merge variables.
- Min order: 10,000 cards.
- Account for rounded corners — don't place content right at the corners.
- Think of this like a business card, gift card, or membership card.

surfaces.label: Back
surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the BACK of a card affix.

Vertical orientation: 2.125" wide × 3.375" tall.
Horizontal orientation: 3.375" wide × 2.125" tall.

No bleed. 1/8" rounded corners.
Safe zone: 0.125" inset from all edges.

No restricted zones — fully customizable.

Design tips:
- The back is often used for terms, instructions, a barcode, or additional branding.
- PDF format only. No merge variables.
- Account for rounded corners.
